title: Event Taxonomy in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger event taxonomy in practice judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Event Taxonomy in Practice is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Event Taxonomy in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good event taxonomy in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Event Taxonomy in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
